zh.Egremont, Cumberland, England: 英國波藍德艾格雷蒙特

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland於大約1183年出生在英國波藍德艾格雷蒙特時，他的父親Reynold de Lucy47歲，母親Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland54歲。他於1200年與Ada de Morville結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1213年2月在他的家鄉享年31歲，埋葬在英國波藍德聖 貝斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland于大约1183年出生在英国波藍德艾格雷蒙特时，他的父亲Reynold de Lucy47岁，母亲Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland54岁。他于1200年与Ada de Morville结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1213年2月在他的家乡享年31岁，埋葬在英国波藍德聖 貝斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland was born about 1183, in Egremont, Cumberland, England, his father, Reynold de Lucy, was 47 and his mother, Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland, was 54. He married Ada de Morville in 1200. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about February 1213, in his hometown, at the age of 31, and was buried in St Bees, Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland est né environ 1183, à Egremont, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Reynold de Lucy, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland, avait 54 ans. Il a épousé Ada de Morville en 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ février 1213, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à St Bees, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland um 1183 in Egremont, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reynold de Lucy 47 und seine Mutter Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland 54. Er hat 1200 Ada de Morville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um Februar 1213 im Alter von 31 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Bees, Cumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland è nato il circa 1183 nel Egremont, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Reynold de Lucy, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland, aveva 54 anni. Lui sposato Ada de Morville nel 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa febbraio 1213, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a St Bees, Cumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Couplandが約1183年にイギリスクウンバーランドエグレモントで生まれた時，父Reynold de Lucyは47歳，母Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copelandは54歳であった。1200年にAda de Morvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1213年2月に故郷で31歳で死去し，イギリスクウンバーランドスト ビーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland(이)가 대략 1183년 영국 c벌랜드 그렘트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reynold de Lucy(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland(은)는 54세였다. 그는 1200년 Ada de Morville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1213년 2월 그의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 c벌랜드 스트 브이스에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1183–about February 1213: tany ho any amin'ny 1183–tany ho any amin'ny febroary 1213

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland nasceu aproximadamente 1183, em Egremont, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reynold de Lucy, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland, tinha 54 anos. Ele casou-se com Ada de Morville em 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente fevereiro de 1213, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em St Bees, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland родился около 1183 г. в местности эгремонт, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Reynold de Lucy было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland, 54. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada de Morville в 1200 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около февраль 1213 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности ст бись, кумбирланд, Англия.

sm.about 1183–about February 1213: e tusa o le 1183–e tusa o le Fepuari 1213

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland nació aproximadamente 1183, en Egremont, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Reynold de Lucy, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland, tenía 54 años. Se casó con Ada de Morville en 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente febrero de 1213, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en St Bees, Cumberland, Inglaterra.
